abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} using the medicine, add +2 and suffer -1 use.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} using the medicine and score a weak hit, its chemicals lessen the time needed to heal and any need to use additional supplies; make the cost -1 instead of -2.

If you are wounded and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} using the medicine, smart chemicals detect the physical injury and act immediately to heal it; take an automatic strong hit, but take or give +1 health instead of +2.

The medicine remains effective for 24 hours after being consumed. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} during that time, add +1 and choose one after resolving the move.

  • Take +2 momentum
  • Add +1 on your next move (not a progress move)

system.description: A drug that rapidly heals the user.
